# Named Assurance Methods

These methods extend the v4 methodology taxonomy. They are not new hypotheses; they are reliability controls.

## A-QLG — *Probatio Portarum Qualitatis* / Quality Gate Test

Purpose: prevent weak assets from shipping.

Use before every post.

Pass condition:

```text
classification, first frame, hook, payoff, text, proof, CTA, trust gates pass
```

## A-RPT — *Trias Replicationis* / Replication Trio

Purpose: prevent scaling one-off luck.

Use after first win.

Pass condition:

```text
3 related executions, 2/3 beat baseline, no trust failure
```

## A-HLT — *Scala Retentionis* / Holdout Ladder Test

Purpose: test whether a mechanism holds across audiences or surfaces.

Use when deciding whether a format is core.

Pass condition:

```text
mechanism survives a new topic, new time window, or second platform
```

## A-DPP — *Portfolium Distributionis* / Distribution Portfolio Protocol

Purpose: reduce dependence on one algorithm.

Use every batch.

Pass condition:

```text
feed + search + owned/partner/controlled exposure represented
```

## A-CRX — *Expositio Moderata* / Controlled Reach Exposure

Purpose: guarantee enough exposure to learn.

Use when organic reach is too low.

Allowed channels:

```text
paid micro-seeding
owned list/community
partner share
Trial Reel
cross-platform controlled repost
```

## A-SLI — *Assecuratio Quaesitionis* / Search Long-Tail Insurance

Purpose: create durable discovery.

Use every 10-video batch.

Pass condition:

```text
at least 2 search-native assets with exact query language
```

## A-FMEA — *Analysis Defectuum* / Failure Mode and Effects Analysis

Purpose: classify failures by signal gate.

Use weekly.

Pass condition:

```text
every failed post has a named failure gate and corrective action
```

## A-BAY — *Tabula Probabilistica* / Bayesian Scoreboard

Purpose: update confidence gradually instead of overreacting.

Use after every batch.

Pass condition:

```text
confidence increases only through repeated evidence, not single wins
```

## A-POD — *Probatio Distributionis* / Proof of Distribution

Purpose: distinguish creative failure from no-exposure failure.

Use when reach is low.

Pass condition:

```text
asset receives minimum exposure through organic or controlled channels before creative is judged
```
